prompt:
Title: "Human Anxiety"
Theme Keywords: Self-growth, business cognition, personal branding, breaking through, value expression

Generate a landscape-oriented Chinese business cognition poster based on this title.

The overall style is a black and red color palette, retro promotional poster, dark industrial wind, coarse paper texture, high-contrast cinematic lighting, strong grain noise, with a sense of oppression and breakthrough coexisting.

On the left side of the screen, place a giant Chinese main title "Fill in the Title Here" with a thick, damaged, print-worn font in red or black-and-red contrast, forming a strong visual focus. Below the title, add a short, impactful Chinese subtitle with a sense of cognitive reversal.

In the middle of the screen, arrange a symbolic figure: could be a creator, worker, freelancer, entrepreneur, or ordinary individual in a state of depression, hesitation, or being stuck. Surround the figure with metaphorical objects related to the theme, such as chains, locks, archive boxes, contracts, portfolios, computers, paper, doors, walls, cracks, light, etc.

On the right side of the screen, show the direction of "breaking through" or "awakening": could be an open door, a beam of strong light, a manifesto-style poster, a growth data panel, order prompts, client inquiries, an upward curve, an opportunity entrance, etc., symbolizing the transition from predicament to expression, transaction, growth, and freedom.

At the bottom of the screen, design a flowchart using red and black wireframes and arrows to show a psychological chain or growth path. For example: Wrong Cognition → Internal Friction Behavior → Opportunity Loss → Breakthrough Method → Positive Result. Red stamp-style slogans can be added in the middle to emphasize core views.

Overall suitable for WeChat official account covers, knowledge article covers, business cognition posters, self-media covers, and personal brand content covers. Strong Chinese typography is required, with strong visual impact, a sense of oppression, awakening, breakthrough, and business. No cute style, no flat illustrations, no 3D rendering, no soft healing style.

16:9
